assumption_basis: Kraken XBTUSD 1000 trades ~2.18 MB in 2165s => ~39.7k trades/day pair; assume 25 pairs avg 60% of that; JSON ~120 bytes/row. NOT extrapolated from BTC alone.
notes: Bounded estimate; trades are event-sparse for smaller pairs. Compressed ~0.6x of canonical.

assumption_basis: Binance BTCUSDT 60 1m bars ~10 KB in 54 min => 1440 bars/day/pair ~240 KB; 25 pairs ~6 MB/day.
notes: OHLCV 12-field arrays; near-zero for illiquid pairs (still 1440 rows).

assumption_basis: Bybit funding history 10 rows ~1 KB; 3 funding intervals/day/pair; 25 pairs => ~25 KB/day.
notes: Funding tiny; dominant cost is trades/bars.

assumption_basis: OKX 427 SWAP instruments ~440 KB one-shot; daily diff ~5 KB; 25 pairs.
notes: Reference metadata; cheap; snapshot + daily delta.

assumption_basis: OKX L2 sz=5 ~0.42 KB/snapshot; calibrate 1 snapshot/5min/pair => 288/day; 25 pairs ~3 MB/day.
notes: Bounded calibration only; not full L2 history.

assumption_basis: Scale U25 pairs 2x; assume 50 pairs, avg 70% of U25 pair volume.
notes: Avoid single-asset extrapolation; uses pair-average from Kraken sample.

assumption_basis: 100 pairs, avg 55% of U25 pair volume (long-tail illiquid).
notes: Long tail reduces per-pair avg; trades still dominate.
Order of ~1-2 TB canonical for trades at U100; bars/funding negligible by comparison.
